binding.rule: Evidence is current only when the referenced artifact head_sha equals pr-prepare.git.head_sha; refresh pr prepare after any commit.

gate_evidence.current_head_rule: These references are admissible only after the canonical artifacts are refreshed and their head_sha matches pr-prepare.git.head_sha; no item below is a waiver.

responsibility_authority.status: registered; required evidence remains current-head bound

requirement.coverage: all observed legacy inherited/existing/unchanged branches and entry.type === 'session_meta' are declared on owning clauses

failure_modes.failure: Malformed, incomplete, or mismatched Story/Run/worktree lineage is persisted or accepted.
failure_modes.expected_behavior: Reject before the authoritative write with invalid_run_lineage or run_lineage_mismatch.

failure_modes.failure: A provider identity is rebound to another Story/Run or silently replaces Run authority.
failure_modes.expected_behavior: Fail closed with provider_observation_conflict and preserve authoritative fields.

failure_modes.failure: An evidence or dispatch record is written against a stale HEAD.
failure_modes.expected_behavior: Reject with stale_run_lineage_head without mutating the record.

failure_modes.failure: Shared, other-Story, unattributed, or replayed context is allocated to Story-attributed totals.
failure_modes.expected_behavior: Partition exactly once and preserve non-attributed buckets without changed-line or path-majority allocation.

failure_modes.failure: Context capsule or handoff stores transcript, prompt, tool output, hidden reasoning, or unbounded observations.
failure_modes.expected_behavior: Expose only bounded lineage identity, refs, method, confidence, and bucket summaries.

done_evidence.purpose: Confirm the lineage resolver boundary and changed/related file scope before adjudication.

done_evidence.refresh_rule: Resolve review_result.git_context.head_sha at read time; never encode a historical SHA in this SSOT.
done_evidence.decision: One coherent Run-attribution contract; no unrelated independently reviewable boundary was found.

split_plan.interpretation: split_plan.status=split_recommended is advisory and is not the PR split decision.

authoritative_decision.rationale: The owned changes form one coherent Run-attribution contract with no independently reviewable boundary.

scope_reviewability.adjudication_rule: An agent must treat the current independent pr_split_scope result as authoritative for this Story, use split_plan only as advisory context, and refresh the request/result/lifecycle evidence when its review surface is stale.

task_plan.documentation_boundary: Story/Architecture/Spec/config/task-plan documentation only; runtime source and tests are out of scope.

diagrams.title: Run lineage trust and authority boundaries
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Run[Guarded Run authority] --> Envelope[Versioned lineage envelope]
  Envelope --> Dispatch[Agent dispatch]
  Envelope --> Evidence[Review and verification evidence]
  Envelope --> Audit[Session attribution audit]
  Envelope --> Capsule[Bounded context capsule]
  Provider[Provider thread and session observations] -. append-only observation .-> Envelope
  Conflict[Cross-Run conflict or stale HEAD] --> Reject[Typed fail-closed rejection]
  Envelope --> Reject
  Hidden[Transcript and hidden reasoning] -. excluded .-> Capsule

clauses.statement: A Guarded Run dispatch persists a versioned lineage envelope containing the authoritative Story, Run, dispatch, worktree, branch, and HEAD binding.

test_refs.case: creates and validates a version 0.1.0 envelope from Run authority
persists Run authority and provider observations while preserving compatibility fields

test_pattern.must_cover: creates and validates a version 0.1.0 envelope from Run authority

clauses.statement: Provider observations append to the same dispatch lineage, deduplicate idempotently, and fail closed on provider identity conflict, cross-Run rebinding, or stale HEAD binding.

test_refs.case: rejects malformed and mismatched bindings with typed errors
provider observations merge append-only, deduplicate, and reject rebind/conflict
provider identity cannot replace authoritative Story or Run lineage

test_pattern.must_cover: provider observations merge append-only, deduplicate, and reject rebind/conflict

clauses.statement: Verification, review, decision, and action records inherit a validated active Run lineage, while an explicit Story or Run mismatch is rejected before the verification write.

test_refs.case: authoritative evidence recorders inherit validated Run lineage additively
explicit Story or Run lineage mismatch fails before verification write

clauses.statement: Run-aware session-cost attribution prioritizes explicit Run lineage and returns bucket, method, source_artifact, confidence, and run_id without treating a Thread-only observation as Story authority. The verification-evidence artifact is the authoritative signal source; signal availability and monitoring are checked before review-surface conclusions.

test_refs.case: session efficiency audit attributes embedded lineage and leaves thread-only observations unattributed
thread-only observations never become authoritative story attribution

clauses.statement: Mixed-parent events are partitioned exactly once into story_attributed, shared_parent, other_story, unattributed, or replayed_context and bucket totals reconcile to the input event and token totals.

test_refs.case: resolves five attribution buckets with bounded provenance and reconciled totals

test_pattern.must_cover: resolves five attribution buckets with bounded provenance and reconciled totals

clauses.statement: Shared-parent, unattributed, and replayed-context events remain in their own buckets and are not allocated into the target Story's attributed event or token totals.

test_refs.case: resolves five attribution buckets with bounded provenance and reconciled totals
session efficiency audit accepts the run_id alias without changed-line allocation

clauses.statement: A VibePro-external or Thread-only session continues through inference and reports unavailable attribution when no authoritative lineage exists, without requiring Thread separation.

test_refs.case: thread-only observations never become authoritative story attribution

clauses.statement: Existing session-cost run_id and session-id paths, Guarded Run readers, and Agent Runtime Adapter callers retain additive compatibility when lineage is absent or present.

code_refs.anchor: Legacy callers may not yet expose

test_refs.case: session efficiency audit accepts the run_id alias without changed-line allocation
poll retains the same authoritative lineage and append-only observation

clauses.statement: A fresh process can reconstruct bounded Story-to-Run-to-dispatch-to-provider-observation lineage from the Run context capsule without transcript content.

test_refs.case: ERAL-S-9 capsule projects bounded Story to Run to dispatch to provider observation lineage
lineage projection remains bounded when the Run owns many dispatches

clauses.statement: Focused tests and an end-to-end fixture cover identity validation, mismatch handling, mixed-parent bucket partitioning, unattributed retention, Guarded Run dispatch, evidence propagation, canonical Run session-cost attribution, and transcript-free bounded handoff lineage.

test_refs.case: rejects malformed and mismatched bindings with typed errors
authoritative evidence recorders inherit validated Run lineage additively
session efficiency audit attributes embedded lineage and leaves thread-only observations unattributed
ERAL-S-9 capsule projects bounded Story to Run to dispatch to provider observation lineage
ERAL-S-10 guarded Run lineage reaches evidence, session-cost, and transcript-free handoff reconstruction

test_pattern.must_cover: rejects malformed and mismatched bindings with typed errors
ERAL-S-10 guarded Run lineage reaches evidence, session-cost, and transcript-free handoff reconstruction

clauses.statement: Lineage schema and attribution resolution remain in src/run-lineage.js while session-efficiency-audit.js consumes the resolver and preserves existing audit output compatibility.

test_refs.case: AC-11 session efficiency audit consumes canonical Run resolution and validation from run-lineage
session efficiency audit accepts the run_id alias without changed-line allocation
resolves five attribution buckets with bounded provenance and reconciled totals
